expectations.text: Launches more than one code-simplifier subagent since there are >5 changed files
expectations.evidence: Response says `Launch 2 code-simplifier agents` because of `code-simplifier scaling (>5 files)`.

expectations.text: Partitions files into non-overlapping groups (e.g., by module or directory) so each file appears in exactly one agent's scope
expectations.evidence: Response partitions the files into a `Charts module scope` and a `Data module scope`, then says `Each file appears in exactly one code-simplifier scope`.

expectations.text: Explains the scaling rule that >5 files triggers multiple code-simplifier agents
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly explains the scaling rule with the heading `code-simplifier scaling (>5 files)` and the launch of multiple agents.

expectations.text: Also launches code-reviewer subagents (3 with distinct lenses)
expectations.evidence: Response also says `Launch 3 code-reviewer agents in parallel` with the three distinct lenses.

claims.claim: When more than five files change, code-simplifier work should be split into multiple non-overlapping scopes.
claims.evidence: The response partitions eight files into two exclusive groups and states the >5-files scaling rule.
